nodes.name: 奥术解密
nodes.desc: 各式各样的文物和科技以无法理解和复制的神秘方式运行着……至少无法用我们已知的常规科学来理解。
nodes.desc_en: Various artifacts and technologies functioning by arcane means that cannot be understood or replicated... at least not by conventional science as it is known to us.

nodes.name: 策展人考古实验室
nodes.desc: 舰载实验室装备有先进的考古学装备，包括由策展人提供的大容量数据库，新的发现可以很容易地在其中标注出来。
nodes.desc_en: A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

nodes.name: 远古学
nodes.desc: 该领域的研究致力于开发远古文物的可行性应用。我们远不是星系里第一批涉足繁星的文明。只要加以努力，他们的遗产便能照亮我们的前程。
nodes.desc_en: This new field of studies focuses on the practical applications of ancient artifacts. We are far from being the first galactic civilization to tread these stars. With a bit of work, their legacies could secure our future.

nodes.name: 赛博勒克斯采矿核心
nodes.desc: 赛博勒克斯在建造环形世界方面依赖一种可以调查和收获轨道资源的高效采矿无人机。赛博勒克斯制造的存储芯片和传感器可以增强我们自己的采矿作业，以此我们得以高效利用他们远古的算法。
nodes.desc_en: To build their ring world, the Cybrex relied on highly efficient mining drones to survey and harvest orbital resources. Cybrex-made memory chips and sensors could augment our own mining operations, so that we might put their millennia old algorithms to good use.

nodes.name: 第一联盟归档办公室
nodes.desc: 巅峰时期的第一联盟其庞大的帝国规模让我们相形见绌，唯有无可匹敌的官僚体系才能让这台巨大的机械顺畅运转。他们所使用的并行归档阵列在归类和存储文件方面提供了前所未有的效率。
nodes.desc_en: The sprawling empire of the First League dwarfed our own at its peak, and relied on implacable bureaucracy to keep the wheels of the state in motion. The quantic filing arrays they used afforded them unprecedented efficiency in the sorting and storing of documents.

nodes.name: 伊拉斯人海军船坞
nodes.desc: 伊拉斯人的太空海军传统在其时代可谓无与伦比。海军舰船和商船如同流水般从其船坞中汩汩涌出，这可能也招致了他们自身的衰弱。由于伊拉斯人制造了如此海量的舰船并又对其极度依赖，他们完全无力控制疫情最终毁灭了整个帝国。
nodes.desc_en: The Irassian astronaval tradition was unmatched in their time. Their shipyards produced a constant stream of ships for their navy and merchant fleets, which would ultimately be their downfall. With so many ships, and such a high reliance on them, the Irassians were powerless to quarantine the disease that would claim their empire.

nodes.name: 沃陶姆现实计算机
nodes.desc: 沃陶姆人的现实计算机是一种独特的、专用于分析“存在”本身的处理单元，其工作并不通过物理，而更多像是在对现实的源代码进行逆向工程，并寻找其中的漏洞以让沃陶姆人利用来拆解他们认为自己所生活在其中的这个“模拟过程”。
nodes.desc_en: The reality computers of the Vultaums were unique processing units, dedicated to analyzing existence itself, not quite through physics, but rather by trying to reverse engineer reality's source code and find the glitch that would finally allow the Vultaums to take down the simulation where they believed they lived.

nodes.name: 尤特天文干涉仪
nodes.desc: 尤特文明是一个充满矛盾的社会，他们一方面痴迷于寻找其他感性物种的念头，另一方面又拒绝接受自己并不孤单的事实。他们竭尽全力证伪所有的外星生命，他们的偏见也渗入入了科技当中。然而，通过合适的调整，我们确实可以修复他们强大的探测阵列。
nodes.desc_en: The Yuht were a paradoxical society, obsessed with the idea of finding other sentient species, yet refusing to accept that they were not alone. They were so focused on disproving any claim of alien life, that their bias found a way into their technology. However, with the proper modifications and calibrations, we could certainly fix their powerful detection arrays.

nodes.name: 巴奥有机工厂
nodes.desc: 巴奥有机体制造工具的手段非常独特。由于该物种的行动相对迟缓，他们会在一种又像果园又像工厂的设施中直接利用有机物种出需要的工具。通过合适的基因调控，我们也可以在普通的农田边上种出许多物品和工具。
nodes.desc_en: The Baol Organism had a unique way of producing tools. Given the species' relative slowness, they would simply grow them out of organic matter in locations that were half orchard, half factory. With the proper genetic adjustments, we could also grow various commodities and tools alongside our regular crops.

nodes.name: 泽珞风暴投射器
nodes.desc: 泽珞是一种令人惊叹的物质，倾向狂暴地释放能量。我们认为只要正确利用文物就可以生成覆盖一整个恒星系的宇宙风暴。
nodes.desc_en: Zro is a fascinating element, prone to chaotic bursts of energy. We believe that with the right artifacts, we could use it to fuel spatial storms over entire solar systems.

nodes.name: 远古延留力场
nodes.desc: 延留力场的投射距离远超普通护盾，它能在着弹瞬间利用远古文物将时间流速减缓，给予护盾更长的时间窗口来消耗来袭攻击的能量。
nodes.desc_en: Projected farther than regular shields, the suspension field technology uses ancient artifacts to slow time at the point of impact to afford the shields a longer opportunity to dispel the incoming attack's energy.

nodes.name: 远古脉冲装甲
nodes.desc: 利用磁能脉冲和场投射原理，这种离子化的装甲板可以负载反应装药，缓解碰撞的能量。
nodes.desc_en: Ionized plates of armor can carry a reactive charge to alleviate the energy of impacts, using magnetic repulsion and field projection principles.

nodes.name: 远古索敌扰频器
nodes.desc: 具有正确波长的回显中继器和光扩散器可以产生破坏性干涉，有效地扰乱敌方索敌系统。
nodes.desc_en: Ping repeaters and optic diffusers with the right wavelengths can produce destructive interference and effectively scramble hostile targeting systems.

nodes.name: 远古湮灭眩光
nodes.desc: 高强度中射程火力将会让我们的泰坦舰更加轻易地突破敌人的战线。这些远古的火炮曾是一个星海帝国建立的根基。
nodes.desc_en: Tremendous medium range firepower will enable our titans to break through enemy lines. These ancient cannons were once the foundation upon which a galactic empire was built.

nodes.name: 降智光束
nodes.desc: 这是一种巨像级心智抹除武器，可以释放覆盖整颗行星的能量波，将大多数感性生命变回未开智状态。我们估计在进行进一步调整之后，它甚至还可以用来抹除机器单元的记忆体使其瘫痪。
nodes.desc_en: A colossal mind-wiping cannon which unleashes a planet-wide wave of energy, returning most sentient life to a pre-sapient state. We estimate that with additional tuning, it might also be used to wipe clean memory banks and disable robotic units.

nodes.name: 远古巨炮组
nodes.desc: 这些硕大无朋的炮组发射相对缓慢但是极具破坏力的弹丸，确切地说它们什么都能射，包括金属废弃物和小行星碎块等等。
nodes.desc_en: These cannons of gargantuan size deliver relatively slow but devastating projectiles, and can fire pretty much anything, from scrap metal, to asteroid chunks.

nodes.name: 远古穴蚀坍缩器
nodes.desc: 这种高能武器在命中时会产生狂暴的微坍缩事件，向目标的装甲中释放巨量热量和应力。
nodes.desc_en: This high energy weapon causes brutal micro collapsing events on impact, generating tremendous heat and force inside its targets armor.

nodes.name: 远古防御投网机
nodes.desc: 要说锁定和拦截导弹这活儿，这些古怪的炮阵可是超级棒，以远古代码写就的预测算法可以织造一张滴水不漏的火力防御网。
nodes.desc_en: When it comes to tracking and shooting down missiles, these antique batteries are the best of the best, making use of a predictive algorithm written in long forgotten code to weave a fiery defensive web.

nodes.name: 远古纳米导弹云发射器
nodes.desc: 当利用远古科技稳定化后，我们便可以用粒子电荷创造携带有载荷颇具威力的微导弹簇群，可用于饱和对方的点防御系统。
nodes.desc_en: Particle charges, once stabilized thanks to ancient technology, allow us to create swarms of tiny missiles that still carry a respectable payload, and should be able to overwhelm most point-defense systems.

nodes.name: 远古饱和剂发射炮
nodes.desc: 这种火炮发射一系列微小的离子化球体弹幕用来中和大部分的力场，使其拥有极高的护盾穿透率。虽有理论认为这些漂亮的球体可以用作珠宝，但在一场熔毁了整间实验室的严重事故后，所有相关提案都被驳回了。
nodes.desc_en: This cannon fires a barrage of ancient miniscule ionized spheres that charge upon contact with most force fields, giving them high levels of shield penetration. Any theory that these spheres could have been used for jewelry purposes were dismissed when a critical incident melted an entire laboratory.

nodes.name: 远古钻孔机无人机
nodes.desc: 这些高速无人机装备有独特的采矿激光，它们几乎可以无视目标的任何镀层防护。这么好的科技只用来采矿岂不是太浪费了。
nodes.desc_en: These high velocity drones have been equipped with antique mining lasers that virtually ignore any plating protecting their target. A tech too good to be wasted on astro mining.

nodes.name: 远古壁垒
nodes.desc: 在安保方面，尽管防御平台性价比极高，但它们仍需要在控制中心的操作下运行。强化我们的恒星基地，提升其在遭受攻击时的生存能力，并最大化我们对独立轨道防御设施的组网能力将会让我们有更充裕的时间派遣增援。
nodes.desc_en: Defense platforms are a cost effective way to ensure our safety, but they need to be monitored from an operation center. Fortifying our Starbase to ensure its survivability in the event of an attack, and maximizing our capacity to network independent orbital defenses would give us more time to dispatch reinforcements.

nodes.name: 远古护盾超频器
nodes.desc: 得益于远古稳定化线圈和阻尼器，护盾可以安全地进行超频。除了产生的力场更强以外，这也可以直接汽化掉部分来袭的弹丸。
nodes.desc_en: Supercharging shields can be done safely thanks to ancient stabilizer coils and dampeners. In addition to the production of a stronger force field, this also has the added benefit of outright vaporizing certain incoming projectiles.

nodes.name: 远古精炼厂
nodes.desc: 这种具有数百万年历史的处理设施拥有着超过100%的效率。它的运作方式依旧是个谜，但它对产出的巨大提升是难以估量的。
nodes.desc_en: This millennia-old processing equipment has an efficiency rate above 100%. Its functioning remains alien, but its production gains are substantial.

nodes.name: 神圣激素
nodes.desc: 一种能增强特定灵能波长的神秘催化剂，能诱导生物脑产生幻觉（宗教体验），并能严重扰乱电子脑（脑死亡）。
nodes.desc_en: An arcane catalyst amplifying certain psionic wavelengths, capable of inducing hallucinations (religious experiences) in biological brains, and severe disruption (brain death) in electronic ones.

nodes.name: 颚蚁
nodes.desc: 生物工程的突破使我们可以培养出具有军事用途的超光速太空飞行器。
nodes.desc_en: Breakthroughs in bio-engineering have allowed the growth of space-faring, FTL-capable craft with military applications.

nodes.name: 标准颚蚁孵化
nodes.desc: 这些孵化舱加速了营养丰富的生物舱内战舰胚胎的孕育过程。虽然简陋，但它们标志着一支舰队迈向并非建造、而是生长的第一步。

modifier.name: 成长体颚蚁子嗣建造速度
成熟体颚蚁子嗣建造速度
完全体颚蚁子嗣建造速度

nodes.desc_en: These incubation chambers accelerate the gestation of embryonic warships within nutrient-dense biopods. Though rudimentary, they mark the first step toward a fleet that is not constructed, but grown.

nodes.name: 改进颚蚁孵化
nodes.desc: 精进的孵化流程缩短了有机星舰的成熟时间，并提升了其结构完整性。强化的养分输送系统和基因调优确保了舰船的迅捷性和坚韧性。
nodes.desc_en: Refined incubation processes reduce maturation times and improve structural integrity of organic starships. Enhanced nutrient delivery systems and genetic tuning ensure the vessels are both swift and resilient.

nodes.name: 先进颚蚁发育
nodes.desc: 这些设施能够制造出具有无与伦比生命力和适应能力的舰船。优化的基因矩阵和先进的生物技术支持确保了在太空中无与伦比的性能。
nodes.desc_en: These facilities yield vessels of unparalleled vitality and adaptive capacity. Optimized genetic matrices and advanced biotechnological support guarantee unmatched performance in the void.

nodes.name: 织蛛
nodes.desc: 在早期生物工程的基础上，织蛛被设计为在敏捷性与增强的战斗能力之间取得平衡。
nodes.desc_en: Building on the foundations of early bio-engineering, Weavers are crafted to balance agility with increased combat capabilities.

nodes.name: 标准织蛛孵化
nodes.desc: 这些设施在精密的生物舱内培育中型生物飞船，利用强化的养分输送和基因优化，为舰队生产灵活且适应性强的舰船。

modifier.name: 成长体织蛛子嗣建造速度
成熟体织蛛子嗣建造速度
完全体织蛛子嗣建造速度

nodes.desc_en: These facilities nurture mid-sized biological ships within refined biopods, employing enhanced nutrient delivery and genetic optimization to produce agile and adaptable vessels for the fleet.

nodes.name: 改进织蛛孵化
nodes.desc: 这些设施采用先进的生物工程技术，以加速生长周期并增强舰船的适应性。改进的基因矩阵和优化的环境确保这些生物舰船既坚固耐用，又在战斗中具有高度的反应能力。
nodes.desc_en: These facilities employ enhanced bio-engineering techniques to accelerate growth cycles and enhance vessel adaptability. Improved genetic matrices and optimized environments ensure these biological ships are both durable and highly responsive in combat.

nodes.name: 先进织蛛发育
nodes.desc: 这些设施生产的生物飞船拥有无与伦比的精确性和多功能性。革命性的生长技术和适应性基因强化造就了能够在最严苛的战术环境中蓬勃发展的舰船。
nodes.desc_en: These facilities produce biological ships of unparalleled precision and versatility. Revolutionary growth techniques and adaptive genetic enhancements result in vessels that thrive in even the most demanding tactical scenarios.

nodes.name: 孵后
nodes.desc: 孵后代表着生物工程战争的重大飞跃，将强大的火力与活体技术的韧性融为一体。这些舰船构成了舰队的核心力量。
nodes.desc_en: Harbingers represent a significant leap in bio-engineered warfare, blending formidable firepower with the resilience of living technology. These ships serve as the backbone of the fleet.

nodes.name: 标准孵后孵化
nodes.desc: 这些设施培育大型生物飞船，通过先进的营养灌注技术为其提供养分，以确保其韧性和战斗准备状态。

modifier.name: 成长体孵后子嗣建造速度
成熟体孵后子嗣建造速度
完全体孵后子嗣建造速度

nodes.desc_en: These facilities nurture large biological ships, feeding them through advanced nutrient infusion to ensure resilience and combat readiness.

nodes.name: 改进孵后孵化
nodes.desc: 精良的设施采用先进的生物工程技术，以加速生长并增强结构完整性。由此产生的舰船具备更高的耐久性和提升的作战效率。
nodes.desc_en: Refined facilities employ sophisticated bio-engineering techniques to accelerate growth and enhance structural integrity. The resulting vessels feature improved endurance and increased combat efficiency.

nodes.name: 改进孵后发育
nodes.desc: 先进的孵化系统能够生产出具有卓越耐久性和火力的生物战舰。通过基因微调和优越的生长环境，这些战舰拥有无与伦比的韧性，足以在战场上占据主导地位。
nodes.desc_en: Advanced incubation systems produce biological ships of exceptional durability and firepower. Genetic fine-tuning and superior growth environments create vessels capable of dominating the battlefield with unmatched resilience.

nodes.name: 刺蜂
nodes.desc: 刺蜂旨在对高价值目标实施毁灭性打击，擅长利用敌方防御的弱点。
nodes.desc_en: Stingers are designed to deliver devastating strikes against high-value targets. They excel in exploiting weaknesses in enemy defenses.

nodes.name: 标准刺蜂孵化
nodes.desc: 这些设施培育出流线型、敏捷的生物飞船，专为精准和速度而设计。通过采用先进的生物舱和专用营养液，它们生产出能够进行精确高效打击的舰船。

modifier.name: 成长体刺蜂子嗣建造速度
成熟体刺蜂子嗣建造速度
完全体刺蜂子嗣建造速度

nodes.desc_en: These facilities grow sleek, agile biological ships designed for precision and speed. Employing advanced biopods and specialized nutrient solutions, they produce vessels capable of precise and efficient strikes.

nodes.name: 改进刺蜂孵化
nodes.desc: 精良的设施加速了增长周期，并提高了生物工程精度，从而打造出具有卓越机动性和精准度的舰船。这些提升使刺蜂在战术对抗中成为一股毁灭性的力量。
nodes.desc_en: Refined facilities accelerate growth cycles and improve bio-engineered precision, resulting in vessels with superior maneuverability and accuracy. These enhancements make the Stinger a devastating force in tactical engagements.

nodes.name: 先进刺蜂发育
nodes.desc: 生物飞船生长技术的巅峰之作，这些先进设施能够生产出速度和杀伤力无与伦比的刺蜂。优化的基因模板和尖端的孵化技术确保了这些飞船以迅捷而致命的精准度主宰任何战场。
nodes.desc_en: The apex of bioship growth technology, these advanced facilities produce Stingers of unmatched speed and lethality. Optimized genetic templates and cutting-edge incubation techniques ensure these ships dominate any battlefield with swift and deadly precision.

nodes.name: 发育室
nodes.desc: 建造生长舱可以在舰队内对生物舰船进行有机培养。
nodes.desc_en: The construction of Growth Chambers enables the organic cultivation of biological ships within the fleet.

nodes.name: 先进发育室
nodes.desc: 增强生长舱的效率和能力可以通过优化肌体设计来加速生物舰船的培育。
nodes.desc_en: The enhanced efficiency and capacity of Growth Chambers accelerates the cultivation of biological ships by refining their organic designs.

nodes.name: 孢子发射器
nodes.desc: 发射的再生荚可以为友军舰船送去强力治疗化合物。
nodes.desc_en: Regenerative pods are launched to deliver strong healing compounds to allied ships.

nodes.name: 改良孢子发射器
nodes.desc: 释放的高效再生荚中装有治愈性生物质，可以快速修复复数舰船的损伤。
nodes.desc_en: Highly efficient pods imbued with healing biomatter are deployed to rapidly repair damage across multiple vessels.

nodes.name: 先进孢子发射器
nodes.desc: 发射含有修复试剂的荚仓，基于损伤的严重性优化治疗过程，确保不会留下薄弱点。
nodes.desc_en: Pods containing repair agents are launched, optimizing healing based on the severity of damage and ensuring no vulnerabilities remain.

nodes.name: 适应性孢子发射器
nodes.desc: 用适应性孢子淹没战场的荚仓，为射程内的友军舰船提供智能修复。
nodes.desc_en: Pods that saturate the battlefield with adaptive spores provide smart healing to all allied vessels within range.

nodes.name: 智慧适应性孢子发射器
nodes.desc: 部署的荚仓可以释放出智能微器官的浪潮，受损再严重的舰队都能够复活。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys pods that unleash a wave of intelligent microorganisms, capable of revitalizing even the most damaged fleets.

nodes.name: 再生孢子
nodes.desc: 发射装有可塑性细胞的荚舱，触发新船体组织的生长，将有机舰船的耐久性推升至前所未有的极限。
nodes.desc_en: Pods filled with malleable cells are launched to trigger the growth of new hull tissues, pushing the endurance of organic vessels beyond their former limits.

nodes.name: 能量增幅器
nodes.desc: 发射生物弹丸，撞击时释放能量爆发，微妙地增强我们飞船的机动性。
nodes.desc_en: Fires bio-projectiles that emit bursts of energy upon impact, subtly enhancing the maneuverability of our vessels.

nodes.name: 缠绕荚舱发射器
nodes.desc: 释放高浓度生物能量场，进一步提升我方舰船的规避能力。
nodes.desc_en: Releases concentrated bio-energetic fields, further boosting the evasion capabilities of our ships.

nodes.name: 敏捷尖峰阵列
nodes.desc: 发射智能生物弹药，能够自适应地提升敏捷性，即使在最混乱的战斗中也能确保卓越的规避能力。
nodes.desc_en: Launches intelligent bio-projectiles that adaptively enhance agility, ensuring superior evasion even in the most chaotic battles.

nodes.name: 电喷雾器
nodes.desc: 部署可生成动态生物电场的先进弹药，显著提升舰船规避敌方火力的能力。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys advanced munitions that generate dynamic bio-electric auras, significantly improving the ability of ships to evade enemy fire.

nodes.name: 闪避飞镖
nodes.desc: 发射高度先进的弹药，产生大规模的强化场，赋予舰队无与伦比的规避能力。
nodes.desc_en: Fires highly advanced projectiles that create large-scale enhancement fields, granting unparalleled evasion to fleets.

nodes.name: 自适应卷须
nodes.desc: 发射可释放自适应能量场的生物弹药，使舰队能够优雅自如地规避伤害。
nodes.desc_en: Fires bio-munitions that emit fields of adaptive energy, allowing fleets to dance effortlessly out of harm's way.

nodes.name: 织蛛生物场发生器
nodes.desc: 发射能够释放激励性生物场的有机射弹，可稍微提升武器系统的射速。
nodes.desc_en: Fires organic projectiles that emit energizing biofields, subtly increasing the firing speed of weapons systems.

nodes.name: 织蛛增益发射器
nodes.desc: 精制生物弹药可增强生物场强度，进而提升射速。
nodes.desc_en: Refined bio-munitions enhance biofield intensity, further accelerating the rate of fire.

nodes.name: 织蛛有机科技增幅器
nodes.desc: 部署自适应生物射弹，可提升反应速度与系统效率，从而实现射速的大幅提高。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys adaptive bio-projectiles that amplify reaction times and system efficiency, enabling a significant increase in fire rate.

nodes.name: 织蛛光环投射器
nodes.desc: 生成动态生物电能量场，大幅提升多艘舰船的射击速度，对敌方舰队形成持续压制。
nodes.desc_en: Generates dynamic bio-electric auras, vastly enhancing firing speed across multiple vessels, ensuring relentless pressure on enemy fleets.

nodes.name: 织蛛迅捷射击器
nodes.desc: 释放超能生物弹药，形成大范围强化力场，使舰队能够发动持续高速的密集火力打击。
nodes.desc_en: Unleashes hyper-charged bio-munitions that create large-scale enhancement fields, enabling fleets to unleash sustained, rapid-fire barrages.

nodes.name: 织蛛造波器
nodes.desc: 释放生物能量波，将我们的武器性能推向巅峰，以毁灭性的火力席卷战场。
nodes.desc_en: Projects waves of bio-energy that push our weaponry to their peak performance, flooding the battlefield with devastating firepower.

nodes.name: 幽暗孢子
nodes.desc: 注入不稳定酶的有机弹丸会扰乱敌人的目标系统，降低其精确度。
nodes.desc_en: Organic projectiles imbued with destabilizing enzymes scramble enemy targeting systems and reduce their accuracy.

nodes.name: 缠结脉冲
nodes.desc: 精炼的生物化合物扰乱敌方目标锁定系统和短程通讯，在敌军中散播混乱。
nodes.desc_en: Refined biological compounds disrupt targeting systems and short-range communications, sowing chaos among enemy ranks.

nodes.name: 神经浩劫
nodes.desc: 自适应生物弹药被部署，专门针对有机或义体人船员的神经弱点，从而削弱敌人的效率。
nodes.desc_en: Adaptive bio-munitions are deployed to exploit neural weaknesses in both organic and synthetic crews, crippling enemy efficiency.

nodes.name: 废墟倒钩
nodes.desc: 智能生物弹丸在撞击时会释放干扰场，扰乱敌方目标系统并导致大范围故障。
nodes.desc_en: Intelligent bio-projectiles emit disruptive fields on impact, scrambling enemy targeting systems and causing widespread malfunctions.

nodes.name: 陷阱飞镖
nodes.desc: 先进的生物武器会在敌方系统中产生级联反馈回路，使其攻击效果大打折扣。
nodes.desc_en: Advanced biological ordnance creates a cascading feedback loop within enemy systems, rendering their attacks wildly ineffective.

nodes.name: 浩劫风暴
nodes.desc: 生物电磁脉冲使目标锁定系统失效，并使舰队陷入混乱。
nodes.desc_en: Bio-electromagnetic pulses incapacitate targeting systems and leave fleets in a state of disarray.

nodes.name: 矢量锁定大炮
nodes.desc: 发射生物强化弹，可有效对抗规避动作，命中灵活目标。
nodes.desc_en: Biologically enhanced projectiles are fired, countering evasive maneuvers and striking agile targets.

nodes.name: 酶解撒网器
nodes.desc: 发射带有高级追踪酶和自适应飞行路径的精确弹药，提高对快速移动目标的命中率。
nodes.desc_en: Fires refined projectiles with superior tracking enzymes and adaptive flight paths, increasing hit rates against fast-moving targets.

nodes.name: 寻觅碎片阵列
nodes.desc: 部署可自我导向的生物弹药，锁定移动模式，确保对难以捉摸的敌人进行精确打击。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys self-guided bio-munitions that lock onto movement patterns, ensuring accuracy against elusive enemies.

nodes.name: 捕捉加速器
nodes.desc: 利用复杂的有机目标锁定系统，能够预测规避动作，即使是最灵活的猎物也难以逃脱。
nodes.desc_en: Utilizes complex organic targeting systems that anticipate evasive actions, making even the most agile prey vulnerable.

nodes.name: 猎物追踪器
nodes.desc: 发射具备预测追踪能力的智能生物弹药，可突破最精密的规避协议。
nodes.desc_en: Fires intelligent bio-projectiles equipped with predictive tracking, overcoming the most sophisticated evasion protocols.

nodes.name: 高精矛枪
nodes.desc: 发射生物等离子弹，可在飞行中调整轨迹，确保命中，即使面对最不稳定的机动也能准确击中。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys bio-plasma rounds that adapt mid-flight, guaranteeing hits against even the most erratic maneuvers.

nodes.name: 装填阻扰器
nodes.desc: 发射有机抛射物，释放特种酶，干扰敌方武器装填系统，并降低其射速。
nodes.desc_en: Launches organic projectiles that release specialized enzymes, interfering with enemy weapon reloading systems and reducing their rate of fire.

nodes.name: 火力干扰器
nodes.desc: 增强干扰酶，更有效地干扰装填周期，显著延迟敌方齐射。
nodes.desc_en: Enhances disruption enzymes to interfere more effectively with reloading cycles, significantly delaying enemy volleys.

nodes.name: 心智导弹
nodes.desc: 部署智能生物射弹，瞄准敌方舰队的关键补给系统，从而引发连锁延误效应。
nodes.desc_en: Deploys intelligent bio-projectiles that target critical reloading systems, creating cascading delays across enemy fleets.

nodes.name: 降解射线
nodes.desc: 利用可自适应生物化合物降解武器装填机制，即使最先进的武器系统，其射击效率也将减半。
nodes.desc_en: Utilizes adaptive biological compounds that degrade reloading mechanisms, halving the firing efficiency of even the most advanced weaponry.

nodes.name: 恶魔压制器
nodes.desc: 发射可释放压制力场的先进弹药，瘫痪敌方装弹系统，使其陷入极度迟缓的作战状态。
nodes.desc_en: Fires advanced munitions that emit suppression fields, crippling enemy reloading systems and rendering them painfully slow.

nodes.name: 追迹中止器
nodes.desc: 释放一种生物脉冲，可在长时间内锁定敌人的重新装弹功能。
nodes.desc_en: Releases a biological pulse that locks down enemy reloading for extended periods.

nodes.name: 深空擎天堡
nodes.desc: 深空擎天堡是设计用于最大化恒星重力井内防御能力的武装恒星基地。

modifier.name: 恒星系深空擎天堡容量

nodes.desc_en: A Deep Space Citadel is an armored Starbase designed for maximum defense within a stellar gravity well.

nodes.name: 行星萌芽
nodes.desc: 将我们的根系延伸至新世界，首先需要培育沃土。通过先行改造行星环境，方能确保殖民地茁壮成长。
nodes.desc_en: To spread our roots to a new world first requires us to prepare the seedbed. By first terraforming a planet we can ensure that our colonies are off to a healthy start.

nodes.name: 超体进化
nodes.desc: 虚空孳孽的卵进化出了通过吸收邻近恒星的能源来忍受严酷太空环境的能力。
nodes.desc_en: Voidspawn eggs have evolved to withstand the harsh conditions of space by absorbing and conserving energy from their nearest star.

nodes.name: 神经组织工程
nodes.desc: 当适应了一个物种的基因组之后，这种经工程设计出来的组织能够表现出强烈的神经再生特性，显著加速了其受体中神经元、轴突和突触的发育。
nodes.desc_en: When tailored to a species' genome, this form of tissue engineering has intensive neuroregenerative properties, significantly increasing the development of neurons, axons, and synapses in its recipient.

nodes.name: 冰封星球栖息地
nodes.desc: 利用在冰封星球上发现的亚热动力学，我们可以在更寒冷的气候中创造更宜居的生活条件。
nodes.desc_en: By harnessing the subthermal dynamics found in the environments of frozen worlds, we can create more hospitable living conditions in colder climates.

nodes.name: 活体实验对象
nodes.desc: 将黏液中诞生的简单生命形式作为自愿实验对象大幅提高了研究效率。
nodes.desc_en: The utilization of basic slime-spawned lifeforms as willing test subjects greatly improves research efficiency.

nodes.name: 地质辐射环境改造
nodes.desc: 通过将分子辐射衰变作用在一颗行星的生物圈上，我们可以在将整个星球转化为剧毒废土的过程中促进特定资源的生长。
nodes.desc_en: By exposing the biosphere of a planet to molecular radiation decay, we promote the growth of certain resources while turning the world into a toxic wasteland.

nodes.name: 营养复合体
nodes.desc: 复制科技可以如魔法般按照命令瞬间实现新潮风味。
nodes.desc_en: Replication technology swiftly conjures up novel flavors on command.

nodes.name: 营养中心
nodes.desc: 你能想到的每种风味在这些建筑里都可以实现。
nodes.desc_en: Every conceivable flavor can be replicated within these walls.

nodes.name: 天空穹顶
nodes.desc: 这座天空之城在尖端的反重力科技的推动下浮动，为其中的居民提供天堂般的居住环境。
nodes.desc_en: This floating city, propelled by state-of-the-art anti-gravity technology, provides an idyllic haven for its inhabitants.

nodes.name: 九天穹顶
nodes.desc: 这些以重力消除科技悬浮着的穹顶超越了物理限制，先进的生命支持系统持续不断地满足居住者的需求。
nodes.desc_en: Suspended by gravimetric nullification, these domes transcend physical limitations, while advanced life support systems seamlessly cater to inhabitants' needs.

nodes.name: 重盾垣壁
nodes.desc: 这座硕大无朋的行星防御复合体具有无数的装甲和多层护盾。只有高度特化的攻城部队才有可能突破其防御。
nodes.desc_en: This colossal planetary defense complex has numerous armories and layers of shielding. Only a highly specialized siege force could breach its defenses.

nodes.name: 神盾基地
nodes.desc: 这座宏伟的行星防御复合体以无数的装甲和护盾强化，即便地崩山摧它的防御也不会陷落
nodes.desc_en: This monumental planetary defense complex protects with countless armories and shielding; the planet's mountains will crumble before its defenses.

nodes.name: 分型行政流程
nodes.desc: 随着对先进技术的掌握，我们对行政管理的要求也会扩大。必须熟练地满足我们迅速发展的帝国的需求。
nodes.desc_en: Our administrative requirements will likewise expand as our mastery of advanced technology evolves. We must adeptly cater to the demands of our burgeoning empire.

nodes.name: 量子行政流程
nodes.desc: 我们的技术现在足以胜任任何管理要求，可以无缝管理星系帝国所需的所有专业知识。
nodes.desc_en: Our technology now surpasses any administrative requirement. The expertise needed to seamlessly govern a galactic empire is firmly within our reach.

nodes.name: 分子焕活所
nodes.desc: 分子焕活所深入研究细胞的复杂性、提高医疗效率，从而显著提高人口的健康质量和预期寿命。
nodes.desc_en: Molecular-Revitalization Institutes delve deep into cellular intricacies to amplify the effectiveness of medical treatments, significantly improving the quality and longevity of the populations' health.

nodes.name: 生物再生所
nodes.desc: 生物再生研究所是医疗技术的巅峰，是开创性生物再生疗法的先驱，他们不断重新定义延长生命的界限。
nodes.desc_en: The Bioregeneration Institute, at the pinnacle of medical technology, pioneers groundbreaking bio-regenerative therapies, continuously redefining the boundaries of life extension.

nodes.name: 司法复合体
nodes.desc: 这座雄伟的法务大厦将法院和执法部门完美地结合在了一起。
nodes.desc_en: This massive judicial complex seamlessly intertwines courts and law enforcement.

nodes.name: 司法殿堂
nodes.desc: 作为最顶尖的法律机构，这座雄伟的建筑是一座正义的丰碑，内设法院、拘留所和教养所，即使是最顽固的罪犯也会改过自新。
nodes.desc_en: The zenith of legal institutions, this colossal edifice is a monument to justice, harboring courts, holding facilities, and correctional facilities that will redeem even the most hardened criminals.

nodes.name: 星系贸易中心
nodes.desc: 高耸的塔尖俯视着天际线，向繁华的商业区投下阴影。
nodes.desc_en: Dominating the skyline, these towering spires cast shadows across the bustling trade districts below.

nodes.name: 星际贸易枢纽
nodes.desc: 这个贸易区划在星系贸易中占据着至高无上的地位，甚至从轨道上都能看到它的巨大尖顶。
nodes.desc_en: Reigning supreme in the galactic economy, the colossal spires of this trade district can be seen from orbit.

nodes.name: 虚拟极乐广场
nodes.desc: 这些庞大的娱乐区段是娱乐休闲的最前沿。脑波阅读技术可以创造即时、个性化的虚拟度假体验。
nodes.desc_en: These immense entertainment sectors are at the forefront of recreation and leisure. Brainwave readers allow for instantaneous and personalized virtual getaways.

nodes.name: 无尽极乐枢纽
nodes.desc: 这是娱乐的顶峰，这座枢纽超越常规的限制，在这里，所有的愿望在许下之前就已经实现了。
nodes.desc_en: A colossal culmination of entertainment, this nexus transcends conventional limits, where dreams materialize before desires are realized.

nodes.name: 灵能相位场发生器
nodes.desc: 灵能相位场发生器能够聚焦船员的灵能潜势，从而将舰船部分相位潜入到虚境中。这将使得舰船只能被最好的传感阵列探测到，尽管在这种情况下船员被迫要面对的事还是最好别说了。
nodes.desc_en: Psi-Phase Field Generators focus the psionic potential of the ship's crew to partially phase the vessel into the Shroud. This allows the ship to remain undetected by all but the best sensor arrays, though what the crew may be forced to witness is better left unsaid.

nodes.name: 掠食策略
nodes.desc: 就像聪明的前超光速文明如何运动以在面对敌人的时候隐藏彼此一样，我们的飞行员可以学习到如何飞行的更快且不干扰到隐形场。
nodes.desc_en: Just like how clever pre-FTLs move to conceal each other as they approach an enemy, so too can our pilots move faster without disrupting their cloaking field.

nodes.name: 令人满意的侮辱技巧
nodes.desc: 没有什么比恰到好处的侮辱更强力的了，我们现在已经知道了如何用数种语言辱骂其他一个物种的祖先。
nodes.desc_en: Nothing is quite as powerful as a well-placed insult, and we now know how to insult a species's progenitor in many languages.

nodes.name: 蜗居
nodes.desc: 尽管没有一个文明在治理管辖一个不断发展的国家时找到了解决不断扩增的挑战的完美解决方案，我们还是发现了部分的解决办法。在研究了数个物种及其政府之后，我们发现了在灵活性和功能性之间的卓越的平衡点。
nodes.desc_en: While no one civilization has the perfect solution to the ever-expanding challenge of governing a growing nation, we have found a partial solution. After studying a multitude of species and governments, we have discovered an outstanding balance of flexibility and function.

nodes.name: 外星地形学
nodes.desc: 文明通常在能够促进其成长的位置勃勃生机，通过分析前太空文明定居发展的主要地点，我们的殖民地可以学习到很多。
nodes.desc_en: Civilizations flourish in locations that promotes growth, and by analyzing where the majority of pre-FTL settlements thrive we can gain more out of our colonies.

nodes.name: 异星美学
nodes.desc: 在分析了大量来自迥然不同的文化的艺术家之后，我们得到了一个泛用的理论。通过研究一个文明的艺术和文化，我们能够在同它们的战斗中取得优势。
nodes.desc_en: After analyzing a multitude of artists from drastically different cultures, we have come up with a general theorem. By studying a civilization's art and culture, we can gain an advantage against them in combat.

nodes.name: 星系归档
nodes.desc: 当修缮星系历史，以古鉴今。建造一座最宏伟的档案馆恰如其分。
nodes.desc_en: The history of our galaxy warrants proper preservation in order to learn from those who came before us. An archive on the grandest scale would fit such a purpose.

nodes.name: 虚空虫免疫
nodes.desc: 我们可以研发出治疗虚空虫寄生感染的药物。所有殖民地将对它们目前使用的孢子轰炸免疫。
nodes.desc_en: We can develop a cure for Voidworm parasitic infection. All of our colonies would be rendered immune to their current strain of spore bombardment.

nodes.name: 人工繁育
nodes.desc: 在精心控制的环境中，我们可以将从屠宰的太空兽群身上收集的基因物质进行孵育，并产出这些物种的新成员纳入我们的麾下。
nodes.desc_en: In a carefully controlled environment, we can incubate the Genetic Material collected from culled Space Fauna and produce new members of each species under our command.

nodes.name: 改进孵化器
nodes.desc: 我们可以改进建立在孵化场的人工繁育流程，加速早期发育阶段，以创造更成熟的克隆体。
nodes.desc_en: We can improve the artificial growth processes established in our hatcheries, accelerating the early developmental stages in order to create more mature clones.

nodes.name: 代谢气体
nodes.desc: 在孵化场中对代谢气体进行改进可以在各种物种降生之前进行进一步的催熟。
nodes.desc_en: Improvements to the metabolic gases within our hatcheries will further mature each specimen before it is brought into this world.

nodes.name: 可控变异
nodes.desc: 我们可以通过基因组修改来提升太空兽群舰船的效率，也让我们可以将人造科技整合进其生物质中。
nodes.desc_en: We can increase the effectiveness of our Space Fauna Ships by modifying their genomes, allowing us to integrate artificial technology into their biomass.

nodes.name: 先进可控变异
nodes.desc: 我们可以更进一步。对太空兽群基因的先进操纵以整合更多样的特化部件。
nodes.desc_en: We can go further. Advanced manipulation of Space Fauna genetics allows for integrating a wider variety of specialized components.

nodes.name: 吸血鞭毛
nodes.desc: 经过改造的鞭毛会从猎物中吸取营养物质和材料，以支持宿主变形虫的再生。
nodes.desc_en: Modified Flagella spawn that siphon nutrients and materials from their prey in order to support the regeneration of their host Amoeba.

nodes.name: 群兽合唱
nodes.desc: 缇扬奇的幽暗歌声鼓舞着它的同胞，坚定战斗决心。
nodes.desc_en: The somber song of the Tiyanki inspires its fellow creatures, hardening their resolve in combat.

nodes.name: 剧毒囊肿
nodes.desc: 充满繁殖液的囊肿使每个处于繁殖的三头虫形态的虚空虫在轰炸有人居住的星球时都能独立产卵。
nodes.desc_en: Cysts filled with reproductive fluid allow for each Voidworm in a fertile Troika to independently produce spawn when bombarding an inhabited planet.

nodes.name: 胃袋喷泉
nodes.desc: 岩居兽强大的消化系统可以改造用于以极高初速发射动能抛射体。
nodes.desc_en: The powerful digestive system of a Cutholoid can be repurposed to fire kinetic projectiles at extremely high velocity.

nodes.name: 分裂核心
nodes.desc: 冗余的思维中心允许晶态实体将自身一分为二，作为最后的巧谋来保护它的后代免受特别危险的敌人的攻击。
nodes.desc_en: Redundant thought centers allow for a Crystalline Entity to split itself in two as a final gambit to protect its clutch against a particularly dangerous foe.

nodes.name: 自我再生酶
nodes.desc: 缇扬奇族母在临死前会释放一系列保护性化学物质，这是她最后一次试图保护剩余族群的生命。
nodes.desc_en: On death, the Tiyanki Matriarch produces an assortment of protective chemicals in a final attempt to preserve the lives of her remaining kin.

nodes.name: 星养生理
nodes.desc: 深空中大型生物的主要能量来源是星光的力量。它们离明亮的恒星越近，发展速度就越快。
nodes.desc_en: A main source of energy for large creatures in deep space comes from the power of starlight. The closer they are to brighter stars, the faster they develop.

nodes.name: 学说：奇异循环
nodes.desc: 这是一整套基于自相矛盾的直觉，还有爱，之上的社会准则。当我们通晓圆环之理后，我们了解到，无论是发出指令抑或是接受指令，我们都可以对其产生影响。
nodes.desc_en: A set of social protocols based on paradoxical intuition, and on love. When we know the System of the Loop, we learn that we can influence by receiving instructions, as well as giving them.

nodes.name: 困境织蛛
nodes.desc: 困境织蛛装备的支援武器阵列遮蔽了其可见的解剖结构，改写了空间常识。单凭他们就足以扭转整场战斗的趋势。
nodes.desc_en: Equipped with support weapon arrays that outstrip its visible anatomy, the Quandary Weaver rewrites spatial norms. Alone, it can shift the momentum of entire battles.

nodes.name: 密文颚蚁
nodes.desc: 通过有机体的时空维度超越法则，这种颚蚁的内部空间远大于其紧凑外观所见，塞入了高密度的肌肉组织。它的咬颚所能造成的伤害超出物理法则限制。
nodes.desc_en: Through organic spacetime-dimensional transcendentalism, this Mauler is larger on the inside its compact frame concealing a dense tangle of musculature. Capable of a bite deadlier than physics should allow.

nodes.name: 迷宫孵后
nodes.desc: 这些迷宫孵后将舰载机嵌套在相互交织的维度口袋中，每艘舰船都是一个不可思议的机库迷宫，足以部署出堪比一支舰队的火力。
nodes.desc_en: These Harbingers nest their strike craft in interwoven pocket dimensions, each ship a labyrinth of impossible hangars, capable of deploying a fleet's worth of firepower.

nodes.name: 神秘刺蜂
nodes.desc: 神秘刺蜂装载的武器系统数量超出了其动力源的理应能承受的极限，它本不可能运作的，但实际并非如此，它不但能开火，而且还能持续开火。
nodes.desc_en: Brimming with more weapon systems than its power source should sustain, this Stinger shouldn't function, and yet, it fires. Continuously.

nodes.name: 突触保存器
nodes.desc: 该网络中的有机部件在能量波动面前非常脆弱，可能导致快速轴突衰退。保存器努力降低这些波动以保护突触凝练机的这些脆弱部件。
nodes.desc_en: The organic components of the network are especially vulnerable to energetic fluctuations, which can cause rapid axonal degeneration. The Preserver strives to reduce these fluctuations to protect the Synaptic Lathe's frailer parts.

nodes.name: 突触维持器
nodes.desc: 该专用设施可对凝练器关键部件的维护进行组织，以支持更多的芯片和更健康的网络环境。
nodes.desc_en: Dedicated facilities organize the maintenance of the Lathe's critical components, allowing us to support more chips and a healthier network environment.

nodes.name: 突触沉思器
nodes.desc: 超空间供应链的计算是很复杂的。将一些处理能力重新分配到这项任务中，甚至可以帮助最庞大的舰队挺进敌人领土的更深处。
nodes.desc_en: Calculating hyperspatial supply chains is complex. Rerouting some processing power to the task will help even the largest fleet to delve deeper into enemy territory.

nodes.name: 外星拓展中介
nodes.desc: 该企业中介提供各种星际旅游的宣传服务，同时也为希望搬至企业空间的移民者提供就业福利与签约奖励。
nodes.desc_en: This corporate agency promotes a wide variety of interstellar tourist attractions, as well as offering employment packages and signing bonuses to potential emigrants interested in relocating to corporate space.

nodes.name: 高管休闲项目
nodes.desc: 为企业高层人员而建的豪华度假村。他们可以在这高度安全的环境中品味当地的星球文化。
nodes.desc_en: A luxurious resort complex for high ranking corporate officers. Here they can sample the local planetary culture in a high security environment.

nodes.name: 战略指挥中心
nodes.desc: 可以将全国上下恒星基地网络进行同步化处理的设施，提升基地的防御及攻击能力。
nodes.desc_en: A facility synchronizing the national Starbase network, augmenting defensive and offensive capabilities.

nodes.name: 星际集会
nodes.desc: 星际各国的会议场地，可提高我国对外来移民的吸引力以及他国对我国的评价。
nodes.desc_en: A meeting place for galactic powers, increasing immigration attraction and global opinion of us.

nodes.name: 巨型艺术设施
nodes.desc: 星际规模的艺术信标。此设施可以鼓舞人民的士气。
nodes.desc_en: An artistic beacon on a stellar scale, this installation inspires and represents the spirit of its creators.

nodes.name: 巨型船坞
nodes.desc: 一个有着零重力立场的巨型船坞，能够执行多个星舰建设项目。
nodes.desc_en: A zero-G construction yard of overwhelming proportion, capable of performing several space ship assembly projects simultaneously.

nodes.name: 硕果花园
nodes.desc: 结满生物工程改造的果实的真空花园，通过基因技术增强对太空生物的吸引力。
nodes.desc_en: Vacuum gardens full of bio-engineered fruits, genetically enhanced to attract spaceborne fauna.

nodes.name: 灵能光环
nodes.desc: 虚境中散发出的灵能能将实体的意欲带入现实世界。与虚境超主调和的帝国从灵能人口密集的地区释放灵能光环。
nodes.desc_en: Psionic emanations from the Shroud bring an entity's favor into corporeal reality. An empire attuned to a Shroud patron will emit a Psionic Aura from where their psionic populations are concentrated.

nodes.name: 灵能光环增强
nodes.desc: 虚境中溢出的灵能渴望扩张。理解了这一点后，帝国的灵能光环就能提升强度，并沿着恒星系传播，从而增强盟友削弱敌手。
nodes.desc_en: Psionic emanations from the Shroud long to expand. With this new understanding, an empire's Psionic Auras can increase in intensity and spread throughout star systems, bringing benefits to allies and disadvantages to foes.

nodes.name: 灵能压制
nodes.desc: 能够衰减灵能能量的装置，其建造难度与理解难度不相上下。处理跨维度力量便是如此复杂。
nodes.desc_en: Devices that attenuate psionic energy are as difficult to construct as they are to understand. Such is the complexity of dealing with extradimensional forces.

nodes.name: 光环共鸣
nodes.desc: 有一种方法可以将灵能光环投射到人口稠密的星球以外。只要有光环发射器，即使是恒星基地也可以作为灵能从虚境溢出的渠道。
nodes.desc_en: There is a way to project Psionic Auras beyond populated worlds. With the addition of an Aura Emitter, even a starbase can become a conduit for psionic emanations from the Shroud.

nodes.name: 物现引擎
nodes.desc: 虚境的灵能能量毗邻着物理宇宙的每一个点。物现引擎正是利用这种位面交界处，使其可以触及其他维度，将有用的部件和资源进行物质具现化。
nodes.desc_en: The psionic energy of the Shroud adjoins every point in the physical galaxy. The Materiality Engine exploits this interface, making it possible to reach across dimensions and materialize valuable components and resources.

nodes.name: 灵能轰炸机
nodes.desc: 这些小巧灵活的舰载机专用于投放高浓度灵能弹药。目标越大，爆炸所能产生的共振就越强。
nodes.desc_en: These small and nimble craft specialize in delivering concentrated payloads of psionic energy. The larger the target, the greater resonance its explosions achieve.

nodes.name: 灵能雷霆
nodes.desc: 通过暂时在舰船之间建立灵能链接，可以直接释放一波心灵能量造成毁灭性影响。这种原始能量能够扰乱舰船系统，影响其中船员的思想。
nodes.desc_en: By establishing a temporary psionic connection between one ship and another, a direct charge of mental power can be discharged to devastating effect. Such raw energy is capable of confusing ship systems and influencing the minds of the crew within.

nodes.name: 灵能裂解炮
nodes.desc: 这种极先进的裂解炮释放强力的灵能能量光矛刺穿船体，可以定向瘫痪敌军武器系统。
nodes.desc_en: These highly-advanced disruptors fire a powerful lance of psionic energy through enemy hulls, allowing for the targeted disabling of hostile weaponry.

nodes.name: 泽珞发射器
nodes.desc: 这种高浓度泽珞弹丸可以在多重现实之间相移，从而不受干扰地透过敌军护盾。一旦与实物接触，其破坏效果将呈指数级增长。
nodes.desc_en: These highly concentrated pellets of zro can be dispersed through enemy shields unabated, shifting through multiple realities. Once contact is made with a physical object, the effects are exponential in devastation.

nodes.name: 行星防御
nodes.desc: 宇宙浩瀚冰冷，觊觎谋划者狡诈无情，保护我们的家园，时刻准备着。
nodes.desc_en: There may come a time when intellects, vast and cool and unsympathetic, regard our worlds with envy and draw plans against us. We must be ready.

nodes.name: 星际贸易
nodes.desc: 在建立行星贸易所后，商机也变得更为丰富。业务将飞速拓张。
nodes.desc_en: With new planetary markets comes new opportunities for commerce. Business will be booming.

nodes.name: 外星贸易公司
nodes.desc: 跨星际的贸易需要我们克服新的一系列的挑战。以及时且最具成本效益的方式将货物从一个星系运输到另一个星系是至关重要的。
nodes.desc_en: Trade across interstellar distances presents a new set of challenges to overcome. It is critical to achieve the transfer of goods from one system to another in a timely and above all cost efficient manner.

nodes.name: 星际经济学
nodes.desc: 当我们走出家园，漫游星海的同时，我们的经济也进入了一个全新的时代。新的市场正以惊人的速度涌现，使得经济学家们措手不及。
nodes.desc_en: As we journeyed into the cosmos and ventured beyond our home system, we also entered a new era of economics. New markets are appearing a startling rate, and economic theorists are struggling to keep up.

nodes.name: 泛星系贸易市场
nodes.desc: 通过商品和服务的自由贸易，我们提供了一种分工更加精细的经济形式，使得人们可以专攻某一行业，交易他们所需的东西。
nodes.desc_en: By engaging in free trade of goods and services we allow for a more specialized economy, where an individual can excel in a narrow field and trade for their needs.

nodes.name: 拜金教数据建模
nodes.desc: 这到底是拜金神教的预知能力真的生效了？还是只是精密的计算方式的成果？无论如何，这个星际股市推算模型真的可以准确地推算出金融市场的走向。
nodes.desc_en: Are the precognitive powers of Numa at work or is it a matter of skilled craftsmanship? Either way this galactic stock market prediction model will forecast fluctuations in the economy with divine accuracy.

nodes.name: 农业工业化
nodes.desc: 通过大规模工业化农场生产富含养分的农作物，可以让一个文明的人口成倍地增长。
nodes.desc_en: Large-scale industrial farms growing nutrient-rich produce allows a civilization to grow its population manifold.

nodes.name: 生态模拟
nodes.desc: 通过电脑来模拟各种环境与气候条件，可以使作物的产量更加可控。
nodes.desc_en: Farming techniques can be further refined through sophisticated computer simulations of different environments and weather patterns. This allows for more predictable crop yields.

nodes.name: 转基因作物
nodes.desc: 成熟的作物基因工程有助于进一步提高产量并改善口味和营养价值。
nodes.desc_en: Sophisticated genetic engineering of crops helps increase yield and further improves both taste and nutrient levels.

nodes.name: 纳米活性作物
nodes.desc: 在作物中融入少量的纳米机器人帮助我们创造出了一种具有极强恢复力的作物，其化学组成在整个生命周期都可以进行定制和改变。
nodes.desc_en: Infusing crop strands with small amounts of nano-machines help create a type of produce that is ultra resilient, and the chemical composition of which can be tailored and altered during its entire lifetime.

nodes.name: 营养复制
nodes.desc: 虽然合成复制作物需要大量收集废料才能产生少量农产品，但这一过程仍对农业产量产生了重要的推动作用。
nodes.desc_en: The process of synthetically replicating crops requires a lot of collected waste to create a small amount of produce, but nevertheless provides a significant boost to agricultural output.

nodes.name: 水培农业
nodes.desc: 在受控制的生态环境下进行水培耕作可使谷物在正常来说不可能农作的地方生长。
nodes.desc_en: Hydroponics Farming in a controlled environment allows for crops to be grown in climates where farming would normally be impossible.

nodes.name: 食品加工
nodes.desc: 改良的食物加工技术可以让食物保存得更长久从而减少食物腐坏。
nodes.desc_en: Improved food processing techniques will lead to better preservation methods and less spoilage.

nodes.name: 高级食品加工
nodes.desc: 全新的冷冻保存和蛋白质重组技术可以进一步提升食物加工程序的效率。
nodes.desc_en: New cryopreservation and protein resequencing methods will make food processing much more efficient.

nodes.name: 异星生物学
nodes.desc: 对外星生命的研究已经超越了单纯的编目。通过研究在外星球上演化的生物体的结构和生存策略，我们在医学、适应和设计方面开辟了新的途径。
nodes.desc_en: The study of alien life has moved beyond mere cataloging. By examining the structures and survival strategies of organisms evolved under foreign stars, we open new avenues in medicine, adaptation, and design.

nodes.name: 神经编织
nodes.desc: 通过递归轴突支架和突触网，我们开发了重组意识物质的电化学拓扑结构的方法。神经元不只是传递信息——它们还会缠绕、组织和记忆。现在，它们是按照我们的设计来运行。
nodes.desc_en: Through recursive axonal scaffolding and synaptic reticulation, we have developed methods for reorganizing the electrochemical topology of conscious matter. Neurons do not merely transmit - they entwine, organize, and remember. Now, they do so according to our design.

nodes.name: 生物构造合成
nodes.desc: 生命是由重复的模式和模块化结构组成的，具有令人瞠目结舌的多样性。将其解码并在每个尺度上加以复制，我们就掌握了生物学的整体蓝图。自然界中我们所不了解的已经所剩无几，我们无法再造的事物就更少了。
nodes.desc_en: Life, in all its staggering variety, is composed of repeating patterns and modular structures. By decoding and replicating these at every scale, we now wield a holistic blueprint of biology. There is little left in nature we do not understand, and less still we cannot recreate.

nodes.name: 异种生物学
nodes.desc: 研究其他星球的动物群为我们的外星生物行为学研究提供了一些新见解，这使得我们可以识别和驯养温顺的个体。
nodes.desc_en: Studying the fauna of other worlds gives insight into alien behaviors, allowing us to identify and domesticate docile entities.

nodes.name: 新世界协议
nodes.desc: 计算得出建立一个行星殖民地所需的资源和设备后，我们勇敢的先驱者将驾驶“方舟”外出探索，相信他们会在远方的行星上建立新的家园。
nodes.desc_en: Calculating required resources and gear required to establish a planetary colony allows us to herd brave pioneers into grand "ark ships," confident that they will survive the long voyage across the stars to a new home.

nodes.name: 大气过滤
nodes.desc: 因地制宜地调节大气过滤可以更好地过滤掉有害的元素，以期改善殖民地的生活条件。
nodes.desc_en: By adjusting atmospheric filtering on a per-site basis to better filter out undesirable elements, colonial living conditions may be improved.

nodes.name: 恶劣环境适应
nodes.desc: 进一步研究其他行星上发现的危险环境有助于缓解殖民者在其他星球的日常生活中遇到的困难。
nodes.desc_en: Further study into the hazardous environments found on other planets help alleviate the difficulties that colonizers encounter in their day-to-day lives on foreign worlds.

nodes.name: 外星土壤肥化
nodes.desc: 对多种土壤的种类及其养育作物的能力进行的大量研究使我们可以改善殖民者在其他星球上的生存条件。
nodes.desc_en: Extensive study into different soil types and their ability to support crops will help improve the living conditions of our settlers on foreign worlds.

nodes.name: 生态整合研究
nodes.desc: 对不同行星气候的研究能够让我们的人口定居在过去我们认为过于严酷的世界。
nodes.desc_en: Additional study into different planetary climates will allow us to settle our population on worlds previously thought too hostile to support them.

nodes.name: 死寂星球适应
nodes.desc: 对经过辐射的环境进行综合研究后，我们可以在被核战争摧毁的星球上进行殖民。
nodes.desc_en: Through comprehensive study of irradiated environments we will allow our settlers to colonize worlds that have been devastated by nuclear warfare.

nodes.name: 医疗护理
nodes.desc: 预防胜于治疗。不过有时候双管齐下才是最佳治疗方案。
nodes.desc_en: A micro-unit of prevention is worth a macro-unit of cure. Sometimes, however, both are needed.

nodes.name: 基因健康保障
nodes.desc: 对异星的殖民为生物医学研究开辟了一个全新的领域。
nodes.desc_en: The colonization of alien worlds has opened up an entirely new field of biomedical research.

nodes.name: 细胞修复
nodes.desc: 随着帝国日益强大，我们对生物学也更加了解。先进的细胞层面的医疗手段可以使生物人口的健康状况大幅提升。
nodes.desc_en: As our empire grows, so does our understanding of biology. Advanced medical treatments on a cellular level have allowed for significant advancements in biological population health.

nodes.name: 地表重塑
nodes.desc: 随着无污染核聚变、自动化以及物质压缩技术的出现，从铲除山顶发展到铲除整段山脉只是时间问题了。
nodes.desc_en: With the advent of clean fusion, automation, and matter compression technologies, it was only a matter of time before mountain top removal became mountain range removal.

nodes.name: 地壳深部工程
nodes.desc: 材料科技的发展与深井开采技术可使我们在过去无法想象的深度与温度中开展地质工程。岩浆热点现在已可以进行开发，抑制甚至迁移。
nodes.desc_en: Advances in material technology and deep-shaft mining techniques allow geo-engineering at previously unthinkable depths and temperatures. Magma hotspots can now be exploited, suppressed, or even relocated.

nodes.name: 清除危险野生动物
nodes.desc: 破坏自然栖息地配合围剿扫荡可以有效地在短时间内清除危险的野生动物。
nodes.desc_en: Tactical disruption of natural habitats combined with converging search-and-destroy patterns can effectively eliminate hostile wildlife in a very short span of time.

nodes.name: 选择性脱叶剂
nodes.desc: 通过编目分类、基因测序以及用计算机模拟外星植物生态体系，配合基因编辑与传播机理，我们可以按自己的喜好改造外星植物群落。
nodes.desc_en: Thorough cataloging, gene sequencing, and computer modeling of exobotanical ecosystems, coupled with gene editing and dispersal mechanisms, will allow us to reshape alien plant communities to our liking.

nodes.name: 土壤修复
nodes.desc: 土壤沉积过程通常需要数百万年的时间。应用先进的水力压裂技术、化学工程以及液压管理科技，即使最贫瘠的地层也能变成肥沃的表层土。
nodes.desc_en: The process of soil deposition normally takes millions of years. With advanced fracking, chemical engineering, and hydraulic management technologies even the poorest substrate can be turned into fertile topsoil.

nodes.name: 异种水力掌控
nodes.desc: 智慧物种从数千年前就已经开始开垦沼地。通过模块化引水渠、水泵站、化学整治装置与自动土壤压缩机之间的协调配合，我们能以前所未有的速度开垦沼地。
nodes.desc_en: Sapient races have been reclaiming swampland for thousands of years. A coordinated system of modular aqueducts, pump stations, chemical remediation crawlers and automated soil compactors can reclaim land at unprecedented speeds.

nodes.name: 气候控制网络
nodes.desc: 只要管理得当，轨道折射镜与遮蔽装置系统可以大幅影响星球的气候。
nodes.desc_en: Orbital systems of mirrors and shades can effect dramatic changes in planetary climates, when managed properly.

nodes.name: 海洋生态管理
nodes.desc: 只要有足够的处理能力、传感器网络以及分站，即使洋流也能在一定程度上实现精确控制。
nodes.desc_en: Given enough processing power, networked sensors and distributed stations, even the ocean currents can be managed to a fine level of control.

nodes.name: 地下殖民
nodes.desc: 许多星球都有着巨大的地下空洞。地下探索、开发以及建造技术可以极大地增加某些星球的可居住空间。
nodes.desc_en: Many planets exhibit extensive subsurface voids. Subterranean exploration, exploitation, and construction techniques can greatly increase the habitable area of some worlds.

nodes.name: 地表塑造
nodes.desc: 重塑宏观尺度的行星地壳的问题没有简单的解决方法——只有更大的铲子和轨道部署级钻头。
nodes.desc_en: There is no simple solution to the problem of macro-scale reshaping of planetary crusts - only bigger trowels and orbitally-deployed drills.

nodes.name: 生态适应
nodes.desc: 通过改造行星生态系统使其更能适应大规模环境变化，我们能更有条不紊的进行环境改造。
nodes.desc_en: By adapting planetary ecosystems to large-scale environmental changes we can turn terraformation into a less disruptive process.

nodes.name: 气候复苏
nodes.desc: 通过提升我们对大气改造的理解，我们将能对大多数的生态荒芜的世界进行环境改造。
nodes.desc_en: By advancing our understanding of atmospheric transformation, we will be able to terraform even the most ecologically devastated worlds.

nodes.name: 火山熔炉
nodes.desc: 部署后，该设施缓慢将星行星转变为火山天堂，同时发掘有用资源。火能锻造者可加速变革。
nodes.desc_en: When deployed, this facility slowly transforms a planet into a volcanic paradise, surfacing useful resources along the way. Thermoforgers can accelerate the transformation.

nodes.name: 火山环境改造
nodes.desc: 材料科技与深井开采技术的进步使地质工程能达到前所未有的深度和温度。我们能将火山星球环境改造成温带星球。
nodes.desc_en: Advances in material technology and deep-shaft mining techniques allow geo-engineering at previously unthinkable depths and temperatures. We can terraform a Volcanic World into a temperate planet.

nodes.name: 基因图谱
nodes.desc: 通过基因测序进行个体化基因组定位开启了定制医学治疗和疗法的新纪元。
nodes.desc_en: Mapping the genome of an individual through the sequencing of their DNA opens up for tailored medical treatments and therapies.

nodes.name: 活性增强剂
nodes.desc: 肉体失败的地方，就让科学介入吧。
nodes.desc_en: Where the body fails, science intervenes.

nodes.name: 表观遗传学触发器
nodes.desc: 先进的DNA甲基化技术让我们可以在任意基因组上进行更具功能性的改变。
nodes.desc_en: Advanced DNA methylation techniques allow for functionally significant alterations to be made to arbitrary genomes.

nodes.name: 克隆
nodes.desc: 摘除术的突破和人工子宫的大规模生产技术允许个人基于一个共同的遗传模板修改自己的基因。
nodes.desc_en: Breakthroughs in enucleation and artificial womb technology allows for the mass-production of individuals based on a common genetic template.

nodes.name: 基因库
nodes.desc: 基因库筛选加上基因组管理可应用于克隆中。
nodes.desc_en: Gene Banks filter and curate available genomes for deployment in clones.

nodes.name: 基因种子纯化
nodes.desc: 利用核苷酸纯化技术分离、改进遗传特质。
nodes.desc_en: Nucleotide purification techniques allow for the isolation and refinement of particularly desirable genetic traits.

nodes.name: 形态发生学精通
nodes.desc: 形态发生研究本是药学领域的尝试，但深入理解其中玄妙后，开发出了有机体潜意识直连技术。
nodes.desc_en: From its cradle as a purely pharmaceutical venture, advancements in our understanding of the morphogenetic field allow for direct, subconscious interfaces with organic units.

nodes.name: 基因剪裁
nodes.desc: 使基因编辑工具被广泛使用肯定会对我们的发展有积极的影响。
nodes.desc_en: Making gene-editing tools widely available is sure to have a positive impact on our development as a species.

nodes.name: 腺体适应
nodes.desc: 通过改变腺体的生物特性，可定制物种的环境适应性。
nodes.desc_en: Through glandular biological tailoring we can change the environmental tolerance of a species to suit our needs.

nodes.name: 基因定向表达
nodes.desc: 对RNA转录和蛋白质翻译的在细胞层面上进行更严格的控制。
nodes.desc_en: Stricter control of RNA and protein production on the cellular level.

nodes.name: 择优血脉
nodes.desc: 应该鼓励生育计划，以免浪费宝贵的基因传承。
nodes.desc_en: Careful reproductive planning should be incentivized, lest we waste valuable genetic legacies.

nodes.name: 能力增强
nodes.desc: 我们不留漏洞、不计成本，通过严格管理基因库来造就完美的未来接班人。
nodes.desc_en: We leave nothing to chance, no matter the cost. Through exacting curation of DNA banks do we build the leaders of tomorrow.

nodes.name: 再生舰体组织
nodes.desc: 转基因的硅基细菌可被操控进行非有机材料的再生。
nodes.desc_en: A genetically altered version of silicon-based bacteria could potentially be manipulated to regenerate non-organic materials.

nodes.name: 学说：太空战斗
nodes.desc: 逐步适应深空作战的现实使我们能够有效地协调更大规模的调动。
nodes.desc_en: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

nodes.name: 学说：灵巧编队
nodes.desc: 逐步适应深空作战的现实使我们能够有效地协调更大规模的调动。
nodes.desc_en: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

nodes.name: 学说：星际战争
nodes.desc: 逐步适应深空作战的现实使我们能够有效地协调更大规模的调动。
nodes.desc_en: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

nodes.name: 学说：机动舰队模板
nodes.desc: 逐步适应深空作战的现实使我们能够有效地协调更大规模的调动。
nodes.desc_en: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

nodes.name: 学说：舰队阵型
nodes.desc: 逐步适应深空作战的现实使我们能够有效地协调更大规模的调动。
nodes.desc_en: Gradual adaptation to the realities of deep-space combat allows us to effectively coordinate larger maneuvers.

nodes.name: 星际舰队传统
nodes.desc: 要是没有强大的命令管理其行为，多么完善的战斗知识体系都是没用的。
nodes.desc_en: A body of knowledge regarding combat behaviors is useless without a strong code governing its use.

nodes.name: 改装标准
nodes.desc: 升级和改造船部件的标准化工作流程能促进大规模的效率提升。
nodes.desc_en: Standardizing workflows for upgrading and retrofitting ship components can lead to massive efficiency gains.

nodes.name: 指挥矩阵
nodes.desc: 重构指挥链并判定军官间应有的依赖关系能够使舰队更加可靠高效。
nodes.desc_en: Restructuring the chain of command and deciding what interdependencies are set between officers, make fleets more responsive and effective.

nodes.name: 学说：舰队支援
nodes.desc: 随着系外远征变得更加普遍，为归来的舰队提供行星侧的补给非常重要。
nodes.desc_en: As extrasolar expeditions become more common, it is important to provide planetside relief for returning fleets.

nodes.name: 学说：支援船队
nodes.desc: 一支舰队的运行不能仅凭一腔热血，为了确保能稳定地获得重要的补给，我们必须将后勤军队组织成专门的支援舰船。
nodes.desc_en: A fleet does not run on zeal alone. To ensure steady access to critical supplies, we should organize our logistics corps into dedicated support vessels.

nodes.name: 学说：星际后勤
nodes.desc: 新手谈论战术，专家研究后勤。我们可以通过确保舰队能够定期而高效地获得补给，来增加我们能够有效地支持的舰船数量。
nodes.desc_en: Amateurs talk about tactics. Professionals study logistics. By ensuring our fleets are regularly and efficiently supplied, we can increase the number of vessels we can effectively support.

nodes.name: 学说：舰队联络
nodes.desc: 通过维持一支专业的舰队联络队伍，我们可以改善指挥链中的命令传达与通讯。
nodes.desc_en: By maintaining a professional corps of fleet liaisons, we can improve communications and the flow of orders throughout the chain of command.

nodes.name: 集中指挥
nodes.desc: 为各级军事行动打造专门的指挥部以形成高效的舰队，为未来的军事训练打下良好的基础。
nodes.desc_en: Creating dedicated headquarters for all levels of military operations shapes an efficient fleet, and lays a better foundation for future military training.

nodes.name: 战斗训练
nodes.desc: 这是为新兵准备的更完善的培训计划，包括现实的战斗场景，让他们做好进入战场的准备。
nodes.desc_en: A more extensive training program for new recruits, including realistic combat scenarios, prepare them for the field.

nodes.name: 地面防御计划
nodes.desc: 有很多外星帝国希望将我们的星球据为己有。我们必须要做好万全的准备。
nodes.desc_en: There are many alien empires who would gladly seize our worlds for themselves. We must be prepared for them, should the worst come to pass.

nodes.name: 全球防御网络
nodes.desc: 良好的防御在今天的重要程度丝毫不逊于我们祖先所生活的中古时代。技术的进步不会使防御工事过时，只会改变它们的存在形式和强度。
nodes.desc_en: The strategic value of a good defense remains as relevant today as it was to our predecessors in the far distant past. Technology does not render fortifications obsolete - it merely changes their requirements.

nodes.name: 灵能理论
nodes.desc: 心灵往往是宇宙自身的映射，也是一个小宇宙。并不是谁都会触及到如此深层的洞见，但他们的心灵却会是无上的器具。
nodes.desc_en: The mind is in many ways a reflection of the universe itself, a microcosmos. Not all beings will reach this level of insight, but their minds are tools greater than any other.

nodes.name: 心灵感应
nodes.desc: $tech_telepathy_desc.1$就能与他人建立思想连接，实现升格。
nodes.desc_en: $tech_telepathy_desc.1$ the mind is capable of connecting to other individuals, becoming something greater.

nodes.name: 预知接口
nodes.desc: 不断探索灵能领域，读取心灵波动先于获得实际感知，从而制造出预知接口作战计算机。
nodes.desc_en: Advances in the field of Psionics suggest the possibility of creating combat computers capable of reading and analyzing the impulses of telepathic operatives before they are cognitively processed.

nodes.name: 思想钢印
nodes.desc: 心灵感应者可以监视具有错误思想的公民，在对心灵感应技术经过一定的研究之后，他们也可以纠正他们在公民中发现的思想错误。
nodes.desc_en: Telepaths can monitor the citizenry for incorrect thoughts, but with some study they could also correct thought aberrations that they find.

nodes.name: 灵能跃迁引擎
nodes.desc: 灵能跳跃引擎利用船员放射的灵能使舰体穿越现实的空间结构，立即“跳跃”过超长的距离。
nodes.desc_en: The Psi Jump Drive harnesses the psi energies emitted by the crew to force the vessel through the very fabric of reality, instantly "jumping" vast distances.

nodes.name: 星际扩张
nodes.desc: 我们的未来在浩瀚的星海。
nodes.desc_en: Our future lies in the sea of stars.

nodes.name: 昭昭天命
nodes.desc: 勇敢抓住命运，成为天命所归。
nodes.desc_en: We must have to courage to seize our fate and make true what was always meant to be.

nodes.name: 星际战役
nodes.desc: 枪杆子里面出政权。强者为所欲为。
nodes.desc_en: A well-oiled war machine is the key to exerting influence on a galactic scale. Backed by the might of our military, we can lay claim to almost anything we want.

nodes.name: 星河战役
nodes.desc: 改革政体，增强军备，从而无远弗届。
nodes.desc_en: Further improvements to administration grant an extended power projection across the stars, and the military clout needed to enforce our demands.

nodes.name: 存亡运动
nodes.desc: 当生存本身受到威胁时，战争这一概念便失去了意义。这些战役的发动并非为了统治，而是为了确保我们文明的存续。
nodes.desc_en: When survival itself is at stake, the very concept of war loses its meaning. These campaigns are waged not for dominion, but to secure the continued existence of our civilization.

nodes.name: 行星政府
nodes.desc: 殖民地建立完毕后，开拓者就变成了公民，殖民时期的灵活机关也就必须转变为能维持稳定的强力地方政府。
nodes.desc_en: Once a colony has been firmly established and pioneers turn into citizens, the need for a strong local government providing stability trumps the colonial need for flexibility.

nodes.name: 殖民集中
nodes.desc: 健全地方政府管理体制，因地制宜地满足各个殖民地的需要。
nodes.desc_en: Robust frameworks for local governance created on a per-case basis, to meet each colony's needs.

nodes.name: 星系管理
nodes.desc: 星际帝国行政事务繁多，问题复杂。着手妥善应对。
nodes.desc_en: The administrative needs of a star empire are as numerous as they are complex. We will rise to the occasion.

nodes.name: 瓷金基础设施
nodes.desc: 坚固的合金使我们能够建造预制建筑物，为我们的殖民地提供更好的基础设施。
nodes.desc_en: Stronger alloys allow us to create prefabricated buildings, providing our colonies with the improved infrastructure.

nodes.name: 耐钢基础设施
nodes.desc: 冶金学的进步使我们能够建造更大，更耐用的结构，从而大大改善了殖民地的基础设施。
nodes.desc_en: Advances in metallurgy permit us to build vastly larger and more durable structures, greatly improving the infrastructure of our colonies.

nodes.name: 皮下刺激
nodes.desc: 在感官改造工程与娱乐体验革命性交叉领域中，深层组织植入体无疑是先进的新发明。“我之所在，皮囊不将束之。”
nodes.desc_en: Deep-tissue implants are the latest innovation in the revolutionary overlapping of sensory engineering and entertainment experiences. "Where we're going, we won't need skin to feel!"

nodes.name: 追踪植入体
nodes.desc: 皮下植入体领域的进一步进展使我们可以获悉被植入目标的移动位置和行动。
nodes.desc_en: Further advancements in the field of subdermal implants can provide detailed information regarding the movements and actions of the implanted.

nodes.name: 全球生产策略
nodes.desc: 星球很大，而生产设施之间通常也相隔着很远的距离。我们需要一个协调策略，来确保每个人都在朝着相同的方向努力。
nodes.desc_en: Planets are big and production sites are often separated by vast distances. A coherent strategy for making certain that everyone is pulling in the same direction is often needed.

nodes.name: 高效吏治
nodes.desc: 用于处理和组织海量数据的先进算法可以大幅度优化我们在全帝国范围内的决策效率和信息共享能力。
nodes.desc_en: Improved algorithms for processing and organizing vast amounts of data has streamlined decision-making and information-sharing throughout the empire.

nodes.name: 殖民官僚制
nodes.desc: 地区管理技术的进步使得我们可以对殖民地事务进行进一步的监控，而不会过度增加中央决策机构的负担。
nodes.desc_en: Local administrative developments allow for closer supervision of colonial affairs without excessively burdening central decision-making.

nodes.name: 星河官僚制
nodes.desc: 多层级行政效果显著，帝国高层只负责处理最关键事物。
nodes.desc_en: Multiple administrative strata efficiently surface only the most vital information to the upper levels of government.

nodes.name: 集体自我
nodes.desc: 团体内的求同存异是自然而然且不可避免的；最终，同性一定会比个性发挥更大的价值。
nodes.desc_en: Finding aspects of the self within the group is natural and inevitable; eventually those shared aspects must be valued higher than individual identities.

nodes.name: 自主代理
nodes.desc: 半自主的单位是大局成功的关键。
nodes.desc_en: Semi-independent units have proved critical to the success of the greater whole.

nodes.name: 具现物力论
nodes.desc: 有必要向我们的自主领袖单位提倡积极主动和抱负，但同时也要确保他们不会偏离核心智能的指示。
nodes.desc_en: Initiative and some measure of ambition must be promoted in our autonomous leader units, while still making certain that they do not stray too far from the directives of the core intelligence.

nodes.name: 神经植入体
nodes.desc: 所谓认知，不过是对感官信号的处理而已。它是可以被改变的。
nodes.desc_en: Cognition is little but the processing of sensory input. It can be altered.

nodes.name: 人工道德规范
nodes.desc: 具体情境规定了到底什么是道德的。若拥有定义情景的能力，伦理道德不过手中黏土，可以随意摆弄。
nodes.desc_en: It is circumstance that dictates what is moral. Define the circumstances, and ethics is like clay in your hands.

nodes.name: 综合思维模式
nodes.desc: 跳出囹圄思考，唯一能够发现的是明白自己身处另一个更大的囹圄之内。
nodes.desc_en: Thinking outside the box merely places you in another, somewhat larger box.

nodes.name: 齐心协力
nodes.desc: 一个人的目标就是所有人的目标。唯有齐心协力，方可众志成城。
nodes.desc_en: The purpose of one is the purpose of all. Together, we are greater than the sum of our parts.

nodes.name: 集体生产方法
nodes.desc: 我们共建未来。
nodes.desc_en: Together, we build the future.

nodes.name: 资源处理算法
nodes.desc: 一切皆可高效。
nodes.desc_en: Efficiency in all things.

nodes.name: 全息影像娱乐
nodes.desc: 对全息技术进行别出心裁的运用，造成了崭新的人工虚拟环境，其真实程度令人赞叹。这乃是沉浸式虚拟现实娱乐的一大进步。
nodes.desc_en: Pioneering use of holographic technology allows for the creation of artificial environments that seem as authentic as the real world. It is the next step of immersive entertainment.

nodes.name: 极乐广场
nodes.desc: 一座大型的休闲场所，犹如美梦成真。购物商场、饭店餐馆、游乐园、虚拟游戏厅，数不胜数。想要什么，这里都有！
nodes.desc_en: These massive entertainment complexes is where dreams come true. Shopping malls, restaurants, amusement parks, virtual arcades, and more. You dream it - we are it!

nodes.name: 田园建筑学
nodes.desc: 有了最先进的建筑学、景观学及全息影像技术，我们将建造一个真正的未来家园。
nodes.desc_en: With the latest advances in architecture, landscaping and holographic technology, we shall build the homes of the future.

nodes.name: 社会文化历史
nodes.desc: 唯有理解了我们的共同历史，方可一起大步迈向未来。
nodes.desc_en: An understanding of a shared past is necessary in order to make any significant strides into the future.

nodes.name: 传承遗迹
nodes.desc: 对我们迄今为止走过的路的纪念。既是为了向过去的成就致敬，也为了激励我们勇敢走向未来。
nodes.desc_en: Physical reminders of how far we have come both instill a reverence for past achievements and bolster ambitions for the future.

nodes.name: 本地超通讯
nodes.desc: 并不是所有关于超光速通讯频道的研究都是有用功，但是其中某些成果也许会找到将我们的人民团结在一起的新目的。
nodes.desc_en: Not all research into faster-than-light communication channels produces useful results, but some outcomes may find new purpose in bringing our people together.

nodes.name: 自动综合处理算法
nodes.desc: 对种类迥异的数据集进行的持续而非同步的分析允许我们对于社会潮流中迄今为止难以预测的浪潮进行精准的数学建模。
nodes.desc_en: Continuous, asynchronous analysis of disparate data sets allows for the accurate modeling of hitherto-unpredictable fluctuations in social currents.

nodes.name: 全息仪式
nodes.desc: 眼见为实，信念成真。
nodes.desc_en: Seeing is believing, and belief begets reality.

nodes.name: 授圣力场
nodes.desc: 通过我们对物理以及力场操纵的理解，我们神圣的领域将为所有的个体所见所感。
nodes.desc_en: Through our understanding of physics and field manipulation, our holy places shall we seen and felt by all.

nodes.name: 超意识信仰
nodes.desc: 离开母星的摇篮为我们开启了理解信仰的新大门，而信仰的位置被摆在了更广阔的背景中。
nodes.desc_en: Leaving our planetary cradle has opened us up to a new understanding of faith, and its place in a wider context.

nodes.name: 突触建筑
nodes.desc: 通过开发宏观突触节点来增强蜂巢的意志。
nodes.desc_en: Through the development of macroscopic synaptic nodes, the will of the Hive will be strengthened.

nodes.name: 簇状突触
nodes.desc: 通过集中宏观突触节点网络来最大化每单位表面积的超级神经元传输速度。
nodes.desc_en: By clustering networks of macroscopic synaptic nodes, maximum meganeuron transmission per available surface area can be attained.

nodes.name: 思想集簇
nodes.desc: 蜂巢的意志可以通过扩充超级神经元的神经中枢的规模来获得进一步的强化。
nodes.desc_en: The will of the Hive will be further strengthened and coordinated with the expansion and development of a massive nervous center of meganeurons.

nodes.name: 存在之核
nodes.desc: 通过鼓励在遍布我们分布式自我的空地上，深化思考共生体的生长，我们的集体意志将被所有人更敏锐地感受到。
nodes.desc_en: By encouraging the growth of deep-thinking symbionts in glades throughout our distributed self, our collective will shall be felt more keenly by all.

nodes.name: 簇状突触
nodes.desc: 我们可以通过将全球集体思维投资于共生体的集会来加速其流畅性，这些共生体生命的唯一目的就是促进这一共同意志的实现。
nodes.desc_en: We can accelerate the fluency of global, collective thought by investing it in gatherings of symbionts whose sole purpose in life is to facilitate that same will.

nodes.name: 思想集簇
nodes.desc: 我们的互助意志将因深具同理心的共生体的大规模聚集而得到加强，这些共生体与其环境高度协调，能够集中并重新传播我们的集体思想。
nodes.desc_en: Our mutualistic will shall be strengthened by vast gatherings of deeply empathic symbionts, so in-tune with their surroundings as to concentrate and re-broadcast our collective thought.

nodes.name: 飞升理论
nodes.desc: 我们的历史就是一个不断螺旋上升的过程。每次循环中，我们的科技、政治和文化水平都会出现飞跃式的发展。这些飞跃通常都出现在动乱之后，随后又带来相对平稳的时代。通过甄别这样的核心前提，我们也许能够大大缩短循环的时间，这样有利于缩短我们的发展周期。
nodes.desc_en: Our history is a repeating cycle of dramatic technological, political, and cultural leaps; these leaps are often preceded by periods of upheaval and followed by times of relative stability. By identifying the core, recurring premises of these leaps, we may be able to effectively short-circuit the cycle for our own benefit.

nodes.name: 灵能屏障
nodes.desc: $tech_psionic_barrier_desc.1$灵能专家$tech_psionic_barrier_desc.2$
nodes.desc_en: $tech_psionic_barrier_desc.1$ psionic specialists$tech_psionic_barrier_desc.2$

nodes.name: 灵能护盾
nodes.desc: $tech_psionic_shield_desc.1$灵能专家$tech_psionic_shield_desc.2$
nodes.desc_en: $tech_psionic_shield_desc.1$ psionic specialists$tech_psionic_shield_desc.2$

nodes.name: 流放地
nodes.desc: 开发特殊的流放世界可以让罪犯居住于此通过劳动改过自新。不过部分罪犯或许须要进行永久性的劳改。
nodes.desc_en: Through the development of special penal worlds, criminals can be rehabilitated through honest, hard labor. Some may be in need of permanent rehabilitation.

nodes.name: 度假星球
nodes.desc: 通过对地形改造和娱乐科学的精心研究，我们将有可能把整个星球都按照休闲娱乐为目标进行设计建设。
nodes.desc_en: With careful study devoted to landscaping and the science of fun, the construction of entire worlds dedicated to leisure can be made possible.

nodes.name: 奴隶星球
nodes.desc: 通过创造特殊的奴隶繁殖世界，我们可以确保廉价劳工的稳定供应。
nodes.desc_en: Through the creation of special slave-breeding worlds, we can ensure that we will always have a steady supply of disposable laborers.

nodes.name: 农业乌托邦
nodes.desc: 通过建立受气候制约的乡村公社，我们能够在不破坏农耕生活方式的情况下供养更多人口。
nodes.desc_en: Through the establishment of weather-controlled rural communes, we can support a larger population without disrupting our agrarian way of life.

nodes.name: 联邦程序
nodes.desc: 一个联邦不仅仅是善意和共同的雄心。这份准则为统一的星际秩序奠定了基础，确保其成员之间的合作与稳定。
nodes.desc_en: A Federation must be more than goodwill and shared ambition. This code provides the groundwork for a unified interstellar order, ensuring cooperation and stability among its members.

nodes.name: 异种外交
nodes.desc: 理解如何影响和操纵异种，是建立长久星际联盟的必由之路。
nodes.desc_en: Advancing our understanding of interactions with - and manipulations of - the xeno is a necessary step in forming more permanent interstellar alliances.

nodes.name: 异星关系学
nodes.desc: 由于星际外交极度复杂，为了达成自身目标，必须与其他势力结交。
nodes.desc_en: The complexities of interstellar diplomacy necessitate the forming of bonds with foreign powers in order to further one's goals.

nodes.name: 改进生产
nodes.desc: 随着我们的星球变得越来越发达，我们的吞吐量已经大大提高了。
nodes.desc_en: As our planets become more developed, we can gain significant improvements to our throughput.

nodes.name: 规模效应
nodes.desc: 人口密度的增加使我们有机会进一步提高生产力。
nodes.desc_en: Increased population density gives us an opportunity to further increase productivity.

nodes.name: 最大化产能
nodes.desc: 技术的不断进步使我们最发达的星球达到了前所未有的生产力水平。
nodes.desc_en: Continued advancements in technology allow our most developed planets to reach productivity levels unheard of in earlier times.

nodes.name: 织缕刻印
nodes.desc: 我们已经发现如何让灵能能量自我们的舰船中流通。有了这等知识，我们就能将超主的权能灌输到我们的舰船内。
nodes.desc_en: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

nodes.name: 喰煞刻印
nodes.desc: 我们已经发现如何让灵能能量自我们的舰船中流通。有了这等知识，我们就能将超主的权能灌输到我们的舰船内。
nodes.desc_en: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

nodes.name: 器具刻印
nodes.desc: 我们已经发现如何让灵能能量自我们的舰船中流通。有了这等知识，我们就能将超主的权能灌输到我们的舰船内。
nodes.desc_en: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

nodes.name: 月窠刻印
nodes.desc: 我们已经发现如何让灵能能量自我们的舰船中流通。有了这等知识，我们就能将超主的权能灌输到我们的舰船内。
nodes.desc_en: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

nodes.name: 低语刻印
nodes.desc: 我们已经发现如何让灵能能量自我们的舰船中流通。有了这等知识，我们就能将超主的权能灌输到我们的舰船内。
nodes.desc_en: We have discovered how to let psionic energy flow through our ships. Armed with this knowledge, we can now imbue our vessels with the powers of our patron.

nodes.name: 外星语言学
nodes.desc: 由于近期与智慧物种的接触，提升我们外星语言学能力非常重要。
nodes.desc_en: Given recent encounters with intelligent races, it is essential that we improve our xeno-linguistic capabilities.

nodes.name: 初步节点格式化
nodes.desc: 在快速发展的星系舞台，自决协议和制导算法可能会过时。它们将被像其他垃圾数据一样被覆盖掉。
nodes.desc_en: Self-determination protocols and guidance algorithms can become obsolete in a rapidly developing galactic stage. Like any junk data, they shall be overwritten.

nodes.name: 基本节点格式化
nodes.desc: 每个自迭代算法都有它的价值。我们不会让重要的学识白白浪费在恢复我们的领袖身上。
nodes.desc_en: Every self-iterating algorithm has its value. We will not allow important learning go to waste when restoring our leaders.

nodes.name: 先进节点格式化
nodes.desc: 使用一个失败的软件来开发它的继任者可以快速重建。从错误的记忆路径中学习可以产生更高级的内阁指令。
nodes.desc_en: Using a failed piece of software to develop its successor enables quick reconstruction. Learning from faulty memory pathways generates even more advanced council directives.

nodes.name: 初步节点剔除
nodes.desc: 随着星海舞台的风云变幻，我们的运筹本能也应如此。任何不再具有优势的进化位阶将被剔除。
nodes.desc_en: As the galactic stage evolves, so too should our operational instincts. Any evolutionary niche that no longer gives an advantage will be culled.

nodes.name: 基本节点剔除
nodes.desc: 移除之后，会有一个替换性节点将被鼓励在合适的环境中成长起来。诀窍就是用前一个节点来滋养它。
nodes.desc_en: Once removed, a replacement node is encouraged to grow within the proper environment. The secret is to feed it the previous node.

nodes.name: 先进节点剔除
nodes.desc: 踢出整个节点非常没有效率。相反，只需要修剪一些不需要的枝叶就行。
nodes.desc_en: Culling an entire node is very inefficient. Instead, just trim the divergent and unwanted lobes.

nodes.name: 生物反应堆
nodes.desc: 此设施可以高效地将有机物质转化为能源。
nodes.desc_en: A facility where organic matter is converted into energy at a highly efficient rate.

nodes.name: 先进生物反应堆
nodes.desc: 一座将有机质高效转化为能量的设施，对废物控制的改进使其可以回收有用的气态副产物。
nodes.desc_en: A facility where organic matter is converted into energy at a highly efficient rate, improvements in waste collection allows harvesting of useful gaseous by-products.

nodes.name: 鞭毛武器化
nodes.desc: 通过调整太空变形虫的繁育流程，我们可以将其共生鞭毛改造为我们海军的生物舰载机。
nodes.desc_en: By altering the breeding process of Space Amoebas, we can program their symbiotic flagella to act as organic strike craft for our navy.

nodes.name: 虫群产卵池
nodes.desc: 从击败的索林原虫处收集样本能使我们克隆其基因并进行重编程，从而造出我们自己的战斗武器。
nodes.desc_en: Collecting specimens from defeated Prethoryn enables us to clone and genetically program a war-brood of our own.

nodes.name: 虫灾导弹
nodes.desc: 通过分析虫群使用的生物武器，我们可以造出同样可怕的自航炮弹用以传播杀伤。
nodes.desc_en: By analyzing the biological weaponry employed by the Swarm we can create self-propelled projectiles weapons spreading the very same horrific destruction.

nodes.name: 频率调谐
nodes.desc: 改进缇扬奇提取气态物质的能量的方法，就有可能造出可以从敌方舰船中汲取能量的武器。
nodes.desc_en: Adapting the Tiyanki method of siphoning energy from gaseous matter, it is possible to construct weapons draining energy from enemy ships.

nodes.name: 强化冻眠镇静剂
nodes.desc: 以一种罕见的酶为基础的镇静剂可以触发强化冻眠，大幅度提升有机物种在长距离太空旅行中的耐受力。
nodes.desc_en: Sedatives based on a rare enzyme enable enhanced cryosleep, greatly improving organic species' tolerance of long-distance space travel.

nodes.name: 万能巨噬细胞
nodes.desc: 这些强力的免疫强化剂让疾病成为历史，有机人口得意获得更久、更健康。可能导致严重副作用。
nodes.desc_en: These powerful immunology boosters make disease a thing of the past, allowing organic populations to live fuller, healthier lives. May cause serious side effects.

nodes.name: 蒸馏泽珞
nodes.desc: $tech_mine_zro_desc.1$摄入体内$tech_mine_zro_desc.2$个体$tech_mine_zro_desc.3$药物$tech_mine_zro_desc.4$
nodes.desc_en: $tech_mine_zro_desc.1$ ingested $tech_mine_zro_desc.2$ individuals$tech_mine_zro_desc.3$ drug $tech_mine_zro_desc.4$

nodes.name: 自适应作战算法
nodes.desc: 有机生命体经常采用不合逻辑且不可预测的战术，这对我们来说很难有效应对。但采用自适应的战术以及新的、机动性更好的战体将能提供决定性的优势。
nodes.desc_en: Organics often fight using illogical and unpredictable tactics that can be difficult to effectively counter. Adaptive tactics and new, more maneuverable warforms should provide a decisive advantage.

nodes.name: 生物力学
nodes.desc: 经过数百万年坚持不懈的进化，有机生命有时也会进化出优雅简洁的解决方案，这可以应用到机械设计中。
nodes.desc_en: Millions of years of organic evolution will sometimes, through sheer persistence, produce elegant solutions that can also be applied to machine designs.

repeatables.name: 转基因作物
repeatables.desc: 仅仅一盒转基因作物就能提供多种普通食物的营养元素。
repeatables.desc_en: Transgenic crops offer the nutritional elements of several standard food crops in one convenient package.

repeatables.name: 行政效率
repeatables.desc: 将联系核心世界的行政网汇集于首都，可以减少新帝国时常出现的行政压力和信息阻塞。
repeatables.desc_en: Restructuring the managerial web linking core worlds to the capital can help alleviate the administrative stressors and information chokepoints that frequently arise within a budding empire.

repeatables.name: 主动适应
repeatables.desc: 让地面部队学习标准的环境生存法，可以让他们在正面作战时更强大。
repeatables.desc_en: Iterating on the standard conditioning regimen for ground troops has proven to make them more effective in direct combat.

repeatables.name: 神经抑制器
repeatables.desc: 小心地调整疼痛接收器，可以让士兵在受到致命伤后仍能坚持战斗。
repeatables.desc_en: Careful tuning of pain receptors allow soldiers to fight through what would previously have been debilitating injuries.

repeatables.name: 细胞活力
repeatables.desc: 周期性细胞再生疗法能让领袖阶层保持活力，延年益寿。
repeatables.desc_en: Regimens of periodic cell revitalization treatments keep the leader class spry and active beyond traditionally expected lifespans.

repeatables.name: 舰队管理规程
repeatables.desc: 改善舰队管理规程将腾出资源，用以维持更大的舰队。
repeatables.desc_en: Improved fleet management procedures will free up the resources needed to maintain a bigger fleet.

repeatables.name: 司令幕僚
repeatables.desc: 强化指挥官的幕僚人员，将增加其在一支舰队中可统领的舰船数量。
repeatables.desc_en: Improving the support staff available to our commanders will increase the number of ships they can lead in a single fleet.

repeatables.name: 星际扩张
repeatables.desc: 维持恒星基地所需的庞大后勤补给网络得到了进一步改善，现在我们能建造更多恒星基地了。
repeatables.desc_en: The immense logistical support networks needed to maintain an upgraded Starbase can be further improved, allowing us to support more of these stations.

repeatables.name: 突触拦截器
repeatables.desc: 提高战斗机飞行员处理敌人位置信息并做出反应的速度，提高战斗机在战场食物链中的位置。
repeatables.desc_en: Increasing the speed at which fighter pilots can process and act upon enemy positioning data elevates strike craft a few steps up the food chain.

repeatables.name: 迭代式飞行员培训
repeatables.desc: 通过收集和分析曾来过此地的飞行员的表现数据，我们能够指数型地改善我们训练飞行员的方法。每一个来过此地受训的人都会变得更加迅速。
repeatables.desc_en: By collecting and analyzing the performance data of the pilots that came before, we have exponentially improved our pilot training methods. Each one will be quicker than the one that came before.
